vapi_registration.purpose: Map Vapi tool calls to backend intent endpoints.

vapi_needs: Vapi API key (inside Vapi dashboard/API only)
credential_policy.note: Vapi should call your backend only. Backend holds Supabase and model credentials server-side.

vapi_registration.server_url_priority_note: Vapi resolves server URL by priority: function tool > assistant > phone number > account-wide.

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Find products by semantic query and optional filters
when_to_use: User asks to find, browse, discover, or recommend products
User asks for products with constraints like price, tags, or stock
when_not_to_use: User already selected one exact product and wants details (use open_product)
User asks to modify cart (use add_to_cart or update_cart)
User is greeting, affirming, making small talk, or asking general questions
User says 'yes', 'sure', 'ok' or similar without a new search intent

tools.name: open_product
tools.description: Open a single product by id. IMPORTANT: You must copy the exact product_id string from the previous search_products result.
when_to_use: User asks to open/view/details of a specific selected product
User confirms opening a product from search results
when_not_to_use: User has not selected a product yet (clarify first)
User asks to browse products (use search_products)
You do not have a valid product_id from a previous search_products response
critical_rules: You MUST copy the exact product_id string from the previous search_products response candidates array
DO NOT generate, invent, or guess a product ID
If you do not have a product_id from a previous search_products response in memory, you CANNOT call this tool
If user says 'yes' after a single search result, copy that result's product_id
If user picks by rank ('the second one'), copy the candidate's product_id at that rank position

product_id.description: The exact product_id string copied from a previous search result

tools.name: add_to_cart
tools.description: Create a cart add intent for storefront execution
when_to_use: User explicitly asks to add an item to cart
clarify_if_missing: Ask which product if product_id is missing
Ask which size/variant if variant_id is missing
Ask quantity if quantity is missing

tools.name: update_cart
tools.description: Create a cart update intent for storefront execution
when_to_use: User asks to change quantity, switch variant, or remove a cart line
clarify_if_missing: Ask which cart line if line_id is missing
Ask target variant if variant_id is missing
Ask quantity if quantity is missing

tools.name: show_cart
tools.description: Open cart view in storefront widget
when_to_use: User asks to see, review, or check cart

tools.name: navigate
tools.description: Navigate to a storefront page without full reload
when_to_use: User asks to go to home, collection, product, cart, or search page
clarify_if_missing: Ask destination if both page and url are missing
